hero.eyebrow: Transforming Agriculture Through Nature, Science & Sustainability
hero.title: Here The Life
hero.body: SOIL promotes sustainable farming through bio-fertilizers, bio-inputs, organic farming solutions, soil health support, and trusted market linkages for farmers.

about.label: About Us
about.title: Restoring Soil. Empowering Farmers.
about.body: At SOIL (Sheevar Organic Industrial Limited), healthy soil is the foundation of healthy food, healthy farmers, and a healthy nation. We support Indian agriculture with sustainable bio-products, organic farming guidance, and long-term farmer partnerships.

why.label: Why Choose Us
why.title: Why Choose SOIL
why.body: Scientifically developed bio-products, expert field guidance, and a support system built for farmers, dealers, distributors, and sustainable agriculture partners.

hero.title: Transforming Agriculture Through Nature, Science & Sustainability
hero.body: At SOIL, healthy soil is the foundation of healthy food, healthy farmers, and a healthy nation. We restore soil health, empower farmers, and create sustainable farm-to-market opportunities.

intro.label: Welcome to SOIL
intro.title: Restoring soil for a stronger agricultural future
intro.body: SOIL (Sheevar Organic Industrial Limited) promotes sustainable farming through bio-fertilizers, bio-inputs, organic farming solutions, and assured market linkages for farmers.

hero.title: Bio-products, organic farming guidance, and market support
hero.body: SOIL supports farmers from soil health management to organic transition, quality inspection, and eligible crop procurement.

items.title: Bio Fertilizers
items.body: Scientifically developed bio-fertilizers improve soil fertility naturally by increasing beneficial microorganisms, enhancing nutrient availability, and promoting healthy plant growth.

items.title: Organic Farming Solutions
items.body: SOIL helps farmers gradually transition from conventional chemical farming to sustainable organic farming with farm assessment, soil health analysis, crop nutrition planning, and field support.

items.title: Chemical Residue Reduction Program
items.body: A structured transition program that focuses on reducing chemical residues through scientific biological solutions and improved cultivation practices.

items.title: Organic Crop Procurement
items.body: SOIL supports eligible organic produce procurement cultivated under recommended practices, subject to quality standards and procurement policies.

hero.title: Grow with SOIL - together we build sustainable agriculture
hero.body: SOIL invites entrepreneurs, agri-professionals, retailers, distributors, and sales experts to build long-term growth with quality products, training, technical support, and market credibility.

hero.title: Products, farmers, events, and field-ready brand visuals
hero.body: All provided SOIL photos and video are organized here so visitors can see the product range, farmer communication, and partner presence together.

hero.title: Apply today and join the SOIL family
hero.body: Send your enquiry for products, farmer support, District Dealer, Block Distributor, Retailer, Sales Executive, or market linkage opportunities.

form.label: Get in Touch
form.title: SOIL team is ready to support your next step
form.body: Share your state, district, business type, and requirement. The SOIL team can guide you with the right product, support, or partnership opportunity.
